name: Integrity
description: All links and passage references resolve. No unintended dead ends. Codeword/state effects don't create contradictions downstream. Only intentional terminals are permitted.

rubric.instructions: Evaluate whether this content maintains structural integrity. Check that all references resolve and there are no unintended dead ends.

criteria.name: reference_resolution
criteria.description: Every choice leads somewhere. All referenced passages exist or are clearly planned.

good: All choices have valid link targets

criteria.name: terminal_intentionality
criteria.description: Dead ends are marked clearly as 'The End' or equivalent. No accidental terminals.

bad: Passage ends abruptly with no choices

criteria.name: state_consistency
criteria.description: State changes don't create downstream contradictions or paradoxes.

good: State effects are consistent across branches
bad: Player can both have and not have an item

failure_guidance: Fix dangling links by creating the target passage or retargeting the choice. Add return paths for forgotten loops or mark passages as intentional terminals. Resolve state contradictions by adjusting conditions or adding fail-forward beats.
